category_sources: source_facts.description says launch_socket_server binds to privileged ports without running a server as root.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives launch_socket_server; source_facts.homepage is the official repository with the same project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes privileged port binding for server use; source_facts.executables lists the CLI.
